headline: Charter Communications (CHTR) Stock Could Be 47.2% Below Fair Value After Its Sharp Pullback
summary: Charter Communications (CHTR) has drawn attention after a sharp share price pullback, with the stock down about 11% over the past month and roughly 41% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Charter Communications. Taking a step back from the latest pullback, Charter Communications has seen its share price weaken over both shorter and longer periods, with a 1 year total shareholder return that has declined 66.56% and a 5 year total shareholder return that has fallen 82.26%. This...
